items.name: Frontal Armor Deep Sea Bunny
items.description:
Urbanshade is proud to present the newest innovation in the bodyarmor field: The Deep Sea Bunny Frontal Protection Plate!

Carrying a Deep Sea Bunny on your chest has shown a 95% increase of combatants unwilling to fire on the carrier, as they do not wish to accidentaly kill the DSB.
